text:
This column documents whether the patient has been on a therapeutic diet as their nutritional approach in the past seven days. 0 = No 
1 = Yes
- = Not Assessed/No Information
533 THRPTC_DIET_DSCHRG_CD THRPTC_DIET_DSCHRG_CD Nutritional Approaches (Discharge): Therapeutic CHAR 1 This column documents whether the patient was on a therapeutic diet as their nutritional approach at the time of discharge. 0 = No 
1 = Yes
- = Not Assessed/No Information
534 NTRTN_NONE_ADMSN_CD NTRTN_NONE_ADMSN_CD
